title: thymus saturejoides subsp. commutatus
intro: Thymus saturejoides subsp. commutatus, also known as Corsican thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Thymus saturejoides subsp. commutatus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and sore throats. The plant can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
